home.eyebrow: Clinical Psychologist · Couples Therapist · Clinical Sexologist
home.subtitle: A safe space to be heard, understood, and move forward. Individual therapy, couples therapy and clinical sexology in Barcelona, Granollers and online.

sobreMi.title: Supporting you with rigour and humanity.

meta.title: Services — Natalia Chias Coughlan
meta.description: Individual therapy (€50), couples therapy (€65) and clinical sexology (€50). 1-hour sessions, in-person in Barcelona and Granollers or online.

servicios.subtitle: 1-hour sessions · Online or in-person · ES · CAT · EN

items.title: Individual therapy
items.description: Support with anxiety, depression, self-esteem, emotional regulation, grief and personal development.

items.title: Couples therapy
items.description: Communication, conflict, crisis, emotional bonds and shared life projects.

items.title: Clinical sexology
items.description: Desire, sexual dysfunctions, sexual education and affective-sexual wellbeing from a respectful and integrative perspective.

meta.title: Approach — Natalia Chias Coughlan
meta.description: Cognitive-behavioural therapy with an integrative perspective.

enfoque.body: I work from a cognitive-behavioural framework, incorporating third-wave tools and humanistic approaches according to each person's needs. There is no single method — there is a therapeutic relationship built around you.

values.label: Acceptance
values.description: Welcoming you without judgement, exactly as you are today.

values.label: Unconditionality
values.description: A stable and honest therapeutic bond.

values.label: Curiosity
values.description: Exploring your story together to understand it.

meta.title: About me — Natalia Chias Coughlan
meta.description: Clinical psychologist, couples therapist and clinical sexologist.

sobreMi.body1: I am a clinical psychologist, couples therapist and clinical sexologist. My training is rooted in the cognitive-behavioural tradition, with an integrative perspective that allows me to adapt the therapeutic process to each individual.
sobreMi.body2: I see clients in person in Barcelona and Granollers, and also online for those who prefer the comfort of their own space.

meta.title: Reviews — Natalia Chias Coughlan
meta.description: What people who have been to therapy say.

items.quote: I felt truly supported from the very first day. A genuinely safe space.

items.author: Individual client

meta.title: FAQ — Natalia Chias Coughlan
meta.description: Common questions about the therapy process.

items.a: Both. I see clients in person in Barcelona and Granollers, and also online.

items.q: What languages do you work in?
items.a: I work in Spanish, Catalan and English.
You can book your first session online through the website, or reach out via WhatsApp or email.

items.q: What happens in the first session?
items.a: It's a first meeting to get to know each other, hear what brings you to therapy, and plan our work together.
